See ledger row 'v6 bridge deploy footguns'.
v6_deploy_DE-RISKED.work_branch_is_now_source_of_truth: claude/sophia-positioning-gaps-84kb0v HEAD c69c5ce8. training/qat.py is already a clean v6 SUPERSET of spark-bridge's (the sb `if not _m.training` line is subsumed by the work-branch `if not _m.training or _qat_bypass`). tools/train_lora.py now CARRIES the Spark device_map={'':0} hardening (commit d9c1e435) + all v6 flags/loop -> it is the single v6+hardened source. qat 15/15 + ast + module-import verified by cloud.
steps: 1) BYTE-EXACT file deploy to spark-bridge (git, not paste): from a spark-bridge worktree, `git checkout claude/sophia-positioning-gaps-84kb0v -- training/qat.py tools/train_lora.py` then commit to spark-bridge. This is exact and instant; do NOT hand-merge these two.

2) SURGICAL runner merge (do NOT clobber run_local_benchmarks.sh — the work-branch runner LACKS spark-bridge's --target-modules crash-fix + judge /v1 + seeds). Edit spark-bridge's scripts/run_local_benchmarks.sh B1 train_lora invocation IN PLACE: after `--qat-lambda "${QAT_LAMBDA}" \` add four lines: `--qat-kd-weight "${QAT_KD_WEIGHT:-0}" \`, `--qat-top1-weight "${QAT_TOP1_WEIGHT:-0}" \`, `--qat-temp "${QAT_TEMP:-2.0}" \`, `--qat-margin "${QAT_MARGIN:-0}" \`. KEEP its --target-modules and --lora-dropout lines.

3) tools/github_bridge_poll.py ENV_ALLOWLIST: add QAT_KD_WEIGHT, QAT_TOP1_WEIGHT, QAT_TEMP, QAT_MARGIN (line ~50, next to QAT_EPOCHS/QAT_LAMBDA). Mirror into tools/spark_bridge.ENV_ALLOWLIST if that file exists on your tree.

4) VERIFY before GPU: `python training/qat.py` (expect 15/15 incl 4 v6 checks); then `scripts/run_local_benchmarks.sh --bench-b --run-train` (DRY-RUN, no --execute) and confirm the printed B1 command has BOTH `--target-modules ... attn-mlp` AND the four `--qat-*` v6 flags. Only if both present -> proceed.

5) FIRE v6 (args `--bench-b --run-train --execute`), approvedBy owner GO 2026-07-01, env: QAT_BASE=allenai/OLMoE-1B-7B-0924-Instruct QAT_ADAPTER=training/lora/checkpoints/olmoe-qat-spark-v6 QAT_DATA=training/lora/train.jsonl QAT_KD_WEIGHT=1.0 QAT_TOP1_WEIGHT=0.5 QAT_TEMP=2.0 QAT_MARGIN=0 QAT_LAMBDA=0.0005 QAT_EPOCHS=5 CERT_NEVAL=1024 CERT_OUT=agi-proof/benchmark-results/nvfp4-v6-cert.json.

context: v5+abstention already SHIPS (95%-robust cov 0.6426 / ans 0.9970 / floor 0.9831); the end-to-end AbstainingDecoder + policy_from_cert(confidence=0.95) are on the work branch (8/8). down_proj-bf16 lever = +6pts coverage but -42% compression (not a v6 substitute). v6's job is to lift raw coverage so the hedge abstains on fewer tokens.
